query:
SELECT id, filename, 
  CASE WHEN thumbnailUrl IS NULL THEN 'NULL' 
       WHEN thumbnailUrl = '' THEN 'EMPTY' 
       ELSE 'HAS_VALUE' END as thumbnail_status,
  thumbnailUrl
FROM media 
WHERE projectId = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE name LIKE '%CIP222%' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT id, filename, 
  CASE WHEN thumbnailUrl IS NULL THEN 'NULL' 
       WHEN thumbnailUrl = '' THEN 'EMPTY' 
       ELSE 'HAS_VALUE' END as thumbnail_status,
  thumbnailUrl
FROM media 
WHERE projectId = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE name LIKE '%CIP222%' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 15;
